instruction: The volume of air contained in the lungs of a certain athlete is modeled by the equation $v=451 \sin (75 \pi t)+886$, where $t$ is time in minutes, and $v$ is volume in cubic centimeters. What is the maximum possible volume of air in the athlete's lungs? Maximum volume=[ANS] cubic centimeters What is the minimum possible volume of air in the athlete's lungs? Minimum volume=[ANS] cubic centimeters How many breaths does the athlete take per minute? [ANS] breaths per minute
